scores.correctness_notes: Core concepts correct (ContainerPath, ensure_contents, LocalPath, PathProtocol, return bool, mode/user/group params). Wrong import path used (charms.operator_libs_linux.v0 instead of charmlibs.pathops). Missing install instruction (uv add charmlibs-pathops). Some minor details differ from gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: Wrong import path fabricated: 'charms.operator_libs_linux.v0' — gold standard uses 'from charmlibs.pathops import ContainerPath'. Also mentions 'is_file()', 'unlink()', 'read_text() normalises newlines' which are not in gold standard and may be hallucinated. The 'source' parameter described as 'file-like object' but gold standard says 'ReadableBuffer'.
